skills.name: skill_builder
skills.description: Helps design, refine, and build system prompts and skills for the Lourdes AI agent.

skills.name: orchestrator
skills.description: Coordinates multiple agent tasks, delegates sub-actions, and manages workflow execution.

skills.name: brand_kit
skills.description: Provides styling guidelines, colors, logos, and typography rules for keeping UI designs on-brand.

skills.name: carousel
skills.description: Assists in constructing interactive, multi-slide markdown carousel components for user walkthroughs.

skills.name: instagram_carousel
skills.description: Generates a complete Instagram carousel with a hook slide, content slides, and a CTA slide — then offers 3 caption options (short, medium, long) with hashtags.

skills.name: brand-kit-generator
skills.description: Generates a complete, accurate brand kit from a website URL, brand name, files, or text, with an optional competitive comparison using the BRANDEX framework.

skills.name: client_intake_agent
skills.description: Client Intake Agent that collects tax documents and answers needed before an appointment for mostly individual 1040 filers and some sole proprietors.

skills.name: hindsight_memory
skills.description: Lourdes's long-term memory layer powered by the Hindsight framework. Stores, recalls, reflects on, and consolidates facts, client preferences, decisions, and interaction history so Lourdes learns over time — not just remembers.

skills.name: luxcare_concierge
skills.description: White-glove luxury concierge response agent for WhoIsDésir® Concierge. Processes all inbound client requests using the LUXCARE framework — assessing urgency, categorizing requests, surfacing missing information, drafting polished client-facing replies signed by Bri, and generating structured internal action items and Google Sheets MCP log recommendations.

skills.name: gws_workspace_cli
skills.description: Enables Lourdes to interact with Google Workspace (Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Chat, and 40+ APIs) using the gws CLI. Handles auth setup, file operations, email management, calendar events, spreadsheet creation, and any Workspace API call via structured JSON output.

skills.name: context_mode
skills.description: Operates in a high-efficiency context-optimizing mode, using sandbox-executed scripts to think in code, indexing files in SQLite/FTS5, searching via BM25, and running diagnostics to keep context window usage minimal.

skills.name: autoresearch
skills.description: Autonomous skill self-improvement loop inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch. Lourdes reads program.md for the research goal, proposes improvement hypotheses for its own skill files, applies changes, scores results on a 4-dimension rubric (clarity, conciseness, trigger_accuracy, output_quality), and keeps or discards based on measurable improvement. All experiments are logged to memory/autoresearch_log.jsonl. The human edits program.md to steer the research; Lourdes runs the experiments.

skills.name: design_taste_frontend
skills.description: Anti-slop frontend design skill (taste-skill v2). Applies a structured design engineering framework for landing pages, portfolios, and redesigns — with brief inference, three-dial configuration (Design Variance, Motion Intensity, Visual Density), design system selection, typography rules, color calibration, layout discipline, image strategy, and a mandatory pre-flight checklist. Prevents LLM design clichés like centered hero + dark mesh, AI-purple gradients, and generic glassmorphism. Lourdes reads the brief, outputs a Design Read, sets dials, then generates premium interfaces.

skills.name: skill_creator
skills.description: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
